pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json description, README.md, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh. Task explicitly requires creating and joining a meeting room with this name.
Confirmed in task.json description (line 5), README.md (line 17), and verifier.py (line 4) SOC occupation context. Task explicitly requires setting display name to this value.
Confirmed in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (lines 49, 66), export_result.sh (line 22), and README.md (line 20). Path is checked by verifier and export scripts.
Confirmed in task.json description (line 5), setup_task.sh (lines 42, 55), README.md (line 59), and export_result.sh (line 41). Environment uses Docker to run Jitsi locally on port 8080.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task using Docker-based Jitsi Meet running at http://localhost:8080. The task requires agents to configure a virtual coaching session by: creating a meeting room named 'FitCoach-LiveSession', setting display name to 'Coach Rivera', enabling virtual background (blur or image), configuring everyone-starts-muted policy, setting video quality to highest available, and documenting the configuration at /home/ga/Desktop/coaching_session_config.txt. All metadata values are verified as correct and consistent with task requirements and documentation. The occupation context is SOC 39-9031.00 (Exercise Trainers and Group Fitness Instructors), verified as legitimate U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics classification.
